steps.title: Use the positive context
steps.content: The passage says the book's reception has been very good and that it won a literature award. The blank should therefore mean that reviewers responded with praise.

steps.title: Choose the praise word
steps.content: The word applauded means praised or celebrated, matching the positive reception and award. A means faulted, C means failed to understand, and D means ignored; each conflicts with the context. The answer is B.
